abstract.t: AI Agents have transformed the way internet applications are developed and have introduced a new set of challenges for organizations. This document describes techniques and concepts that are emerging to assist with these challenges, and relates them to concepts already familiar to the internet community. The pace of change in this area is accelerating, and it is anticipated that much of what this document discusses will become outdated quickly; nevertheless, a static publication may prove amusing to future readers, whether machine or human.
